nasb.text: Plunder the silver! Plunder the gold! For there is no limit to the treasure— Wealth from every kind of desirable object.

esv.text: Plunder the silver, plunder the gold! There is no end of the treasure or of the wealth of all precious things.

cnv.text: 你們劫掠銀子，搶奪金子吧！ 積蓄的財寶無窮無盡， 珍貴的器皿不可勝數。

ccb.text: 抢银子吧！抢金子吧！ 城里有无尽的财富和数不清的宝物。
